paperTitle: 3D Dynamics-Aware Manipulation: Endowing Manipulation Policies with 3D Foresight

benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Suites: 1 task 96.9 · 2 tasks 92 · 3 tasks 85.7 · 4 tasks 78.8 · 5 tasks 71.3 | Table I | Notes: ABC→D split, 1000 chains, avg_len metric.

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero spatial 96.4 · libero object 98 · libero goal 94.8 | Tasks: reported avg 95.3 | Table II | Notes: Paper reports Spatial, Object, Goal, Long suites but not libero_10. Long is not the same as libero_10. Missing libero_10 means overall_score must be null. The Avg. SR of 95.3 includes Long instead of libero_10.
